scripts.dev:setup: npm run db:push -w @seoaifrog/api && npm run build -w @seoaifrog/shared && concurrently -n api,crawl,audit,web,shared -c blue,green,magenta,cyan,yellow "npx tsx apps/api/src/server.ts" "npx tsx apps/api/src/jobs/crawlWorker.ts" "npx tsx apps/api/src/jobs/auditWorker.ts" "npm run dev -w @seoaifrog/web" "npm run dev -w @seoaifrog/shared"
